name: Tamagotchi
description: 1996 Bandai virtual pet LCD aesthetic. Egg-shaped device, yellow-green monochrome screen, pixel characters, 3-button interface. The charm of extreme limitation — tiny resolution, 1-bit graphics, simple beeps.
source: Bandai Tamagotchi (1996), virtual pet LCD devices, low-res monochrome handheld games

suggestions.icons: Pixel block shapes made from CSS grid squares, avoid emoji rendering
suggestions.components: LCD stat bars with block characters, pixel pet grid, egg-shaped device frame, physical round buttons, icon bar, monochrome display
suggestions.avoid: gradients inside LCD, anti-aliased fonts, smooth animations, bright colors inside screen, rounded corners on pixel elements
suggestions.texture: LCD pixel grid via subtle repeating pattern, plastic shell texture via inset highlight shadow
